crime.value: Mass murder of clan family members by sword/blade attack
crime.quote: My Mom was killed and I couldn't save her, my sister was slaughtered and I couldn't protect her.

victim.value: Aizen clan family (mother and sister) targeted for their clan heritage/bloodline
victim.quote: Your the heir of the clan? He asked.

culprit_and_motive.value: Unknown masked killer targeting the Aizen clan, motive unclear but appears clan-related
culprit_and_motive.quote: He had a laugh so cold a laugh that would make anybody tremble in fear.

resolution.value: Protagonist kills two attackers in black cloaks, continues quest for vengeance
resolution.quote: I got the best of her and swayed my blade across her stomach... I pierced his chest will full power.

investigator.value: Yoshimaru Aizen, surviving clan heir seeking vengeance for her murdered family
investigator.quote: For my name is Yoshimaru Aizen, The last remaining Heir!

social_world.value: Clan hierarchy with heir, servants, and vows of protection creating clear power structures and obligations
social_world.quote: Shishimaru was only a servant, he wasn't like me nor Hanatoro. He vowed to protect me, but with what power?

reveal_mechanic.value: Spiritual vision revealing the true nature of attackers and protagonist's destiny through deceased family members
reveal_mechanic.quote: I couldn't believe it but it was as if I was staring at a version of myself I didn't even recognize!

investigator_wound.value: Survivor's guilt and failure to protect family members, driving quest for vengeance despite personal cost
investigator_wound.quote: I was supposed to protect her, and I failed. I remembered the chant the sang when she was born

_meta.title: ebook legacy jackson akatsuki no kuruma 1
